title: Vendor Coordination Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger vendor coordination foundations judgment so operations work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Vendor Coordination Foundations is a leverage point inside operations. It supports the broader goal of process design, sops, delivery systems, and execution rhythm.
coreConcepts: Vendor Coordination Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good vendor coordination foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Vendor Coordination Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
